summary: Completed testing of serviceFee feature for Winner's Consulting. All 7 backend tests passed, frontend Frais tab shows actual amounts (serviceFee=500€, applicationFee=100€) instead of 'Contactez-nous'
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: serviceFee field properly defined in both OfferCreate (line 109) and Offer (line 143) models with default 0
Backend: PUT /api/admin/offers/{id} correctly saves serviceFee to MongoDB and returns updated offer
Backend: POST /api/admin/offers creates offer with serviceFee value
Frontend: OfferDetailModal.jsx (lines 517-533) correctly displays serviceFee and fees.applicationFee in orange section
Frontend: AdminCMS.jsx (lines 1587-1612) has proper input fields for both 'Frais de dossier' and 'Frais de service' in orange-styled section
seed_data_creation: Test offers created with serviceFee=750 during backend testing (auto-cleaned)
context_for_next_testing_agent: serviceFee feature fully implemented and tested. Architecture et Design offer has serviceFee=500 and applicationFee=100. The Frais tab in OfferDetailModal shows actual amounts with orange-styled Winner's Consulting section. No 'Contactez-nous' placeholder text - actual euro amounts displayed.

backend_apis.POST /api/admin/offers with serviceFee: PASS - Creates offer with serviceFee field
backend_apis.GET /api/offers returns serviceFee: PASS - All offers include serviceFee field
backend_apis.Default serviceFee=0: PASS - serviceFee defaults to 0 when not specified

frontend_ui.OfferDetailModal_Frais_tab: PASS - Shows 'Frais de service Winner's Consulting' section with orange styling
frontend_ui.Frais_de_dossier_display: PASS - Shows applicationFee amount (100€) for Architecture et Design offer
frontend_ui.Frais_de_service_display: PASS - Shows serviceFee amount (500€) for Architecture et Design offer
frontend_ui.No_Contactez_nous_text: PASS - Actual amounts shown, no placeholder text
frontend_ui.AdminCMS_form_has_fees_inputs: VERIFIED via code review - Lines 1587-1612 have Frais de dossier and Frais de service inputs in orange section

verification_screenshots: /app/.screenshots/frais_full_view.png - Shows complete Frais tab with serviceFee=500€ and applicationFee=100€
notes: Admin CMS form testing was blocked by login modal backdrop intercepting clicks. However, code review confirms the form fields exist at lines 1587-1612 in AdminCMS.jsx with proper orange styling and number input fields for both fees.
